posts.author: EricChatry (CHATRY)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello
Sorry for that question but I am spending time not finding the answer on Monday… so here it is.
I made a first import of data but I forgot 1 column
I expect when I reimport that I can just update that missing column…
But whatever I try, I cannot just get my existing elements with all date including the new mapped column.
What am I missing ?

posts.author: GiannisKoukounas (Giannis Koukounas)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @EricChatry ,

Welcome to the monday community!

You should choose the 3rd option here, and this will essentially update all of your previously imported items with the column you initially missed.

image993×672 38.5 KB

Hope this helps!

Giannis, Implementation Consultant at thespelas.com
